data.acceptance:
1. recipients.signed.toml changes require quorum signatures from the OLD operators list.
2. Manifest (or sibling file) stores a policy hash; mismatched hash rejects subsequent quorum-gated ops with a clear error.
3. New `--bootstrap-policy` flag handles first-time enrolment when no policy hash exists yet.
4. Tests cover: bootstrap path, quorum-satisfied policy update, quorum-short rejection, stale-policy detection.
5. docs/recipient-quorum.md and SECURITY.md updated.
